message: I've finally obtained Ariana's consent, so I came to report.
Is it a modest room for a big-name actress, or is it actually just elegantly put together?
Even though a famous actress is lying provocatively right in front of me, I'm not that excited. She seems toxic.
a vacation home, I guess? Is the real home in Beverly Hills or maybe around Miami?
It seems like she got in a good mood thanks to securing a promise from Cindy. I guess I have to show some good sides sometimes.
She looks so youthful and alluring that it's hard to believe she already has a teenager.
Ah, I can't wait for a week from now.
By the way, what should I do about the date to meet with my daughter? Tomorrow?
Ah, but I'm not emotionally ready right away.
Hey, could we do it about a week later?
Got it. So, where should we meet in a week?
How about in front of the Guggenheim Museum? I really like that place.
I can finally meet her, my daughter.
I’m so sorry to have kept you waiting.
It's okay, no worries. It's all just a funny story now. I can finally meet my daughter.
First, we need to decide on the day and place to meet.
Y-yeah, you're right. We need that. Ah, I'm so nervous.
She's my daughter, so she must be really beautiful, right?
Yes, she's a very cute girl.
She must have gone through a lot, but is she living comfortably now?
It's better for you to find that out yourself.
I can finally meet my daughter.
But that doesn't matter anymore. I can meet Ariana. Ah, what should I do?
Just because Cindy made plans to meet doesn't mean...
I wonder if she's thought about the situation?
I hope it doesn't leave a bad aftertaste.
Things probably aren't as good as she thinks, right? Her honey isn't as sweet as her mother thinks.
Honestly, I didn't think Cindy would agree to meet her mother. I feel the same way about why meet now.
If Cindy is willing, the rest will be easy for me. What happens afterward is not my concern.
Thanks for your hard work, I really appreciate it.
